discussion_comments.comment_body: Dots (`.`) should probably not be allowed because of path traversal shenanigans. It doesn't seem to be exploitable with the current logic, but we don't want a small change later leading to a situation where running the program on a model name like `model/../../path` can somehow delete an arbitrary file.
